other_observers: Dave Leatherman (and others on subsequent days);
specific_location: Kitty Corner across street from Last Chance Rest Stop
description: Strikingly bright solitary vireo with lemon yellow sides lightly washed with some olive, deep blue-gray head, emerald green back. Big bold wingbars washed lightly in yellow (not visible in photos for some reason). Sharp contrast between nape and back, and between auriculars and throat.Behaviors: Feeding slowly in junipers.Call: not heardPlumage: not determined
